title: pelargonium castellianum
intro: Pelargonium castellianum, also known as the Castellian rose geranium, is a species of flowering plant within the geranium family, known for its distinctive appearance and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and fever, due to its high content of essential oils, particularly geraniol, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium castellianum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate stress, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium castellianum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
